title: Documentation
subtitle: Learn how to use Zats Green Score to evaluate your projects.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
steps: Click **"+ New Project"** in the navigation bar
Enter your project name and description
Select an evaluation type (API Green Score or EROOM)

createProject.title: Creating a Project
createProject.description: A project represents a digital service, API, or application you want to evaluate. Each project can have multiple evaluations of different types.

fields.name: Name
fields.description: A short, descriptive name for your project

fields.name: Description
fields.description: Details about what the project does

fields.name: Evaluation Type
fields.description: The methodology to use for assessment

types.name: API Green Score
types.description: Evaluates API design and implementation against eco-design best practices.

types.name: EROOM (EOF v1.1)
types.description: Measures optimization potential across 6 categories plus a quick diagnosis.
types.categories: Product, Architecture, Infrastructure, Storage & Data, Algo & Code, Ease of Change

ranges.description: Very mature service, few optimizations needed
High optimization potential - priority actions needed

questions.question: Where is my data stored?
questions.answer: All data is stored locally in your browser's localStorage. Nothing is sent to external servers. Your evaluations remain private and on your device.

questions.question: Can I have multiple evaluations on one project?
questions.answer: Yes! Each project can have both an API Green Score evaluation and an EROOM evaluation. Use the evaluation type selector on the project view page to switch between them.

questions.question: Is my progress saved automatically?
questions.answer: Yes, your answers are saved automatically as you complete the questionnaire. You can leave and come back at any time.

questions.question: Can I export my results?
questions.answer: Export functionality is planned for a future release. For now, you can view your results on the project detail page.
